title: Section 38
content: (1) The Central Government may, on the recommendation of the National Dairy Development Board, if satisfied that it is necessary so to do in the public interest, make any scheme for the purpose of enabling the National Dairy Development Board to undertake and perform any of the activities or functions of the Central Government relatable to dairy, foodstuffs and connected industries, particularly with reference to matters related to the development of the national milk grid by the regulation of the production, procurement, marketing, export-import, maintenance of standards or such like activities (including the collection and compilation of statistics and relevant data). (2) Every scheme made under sub-section (1) shall be published in the Official Gazette and may contain such conditions, restrictions or limitations as the Central Government may deem fit to impose.
